memoryArtifacts.description:
I have no idea the order of the daughters of Robert Pargiter, only the order of the sons as given in the Visitation of 1566 (copied from the New York Library records whilst in new York)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Aimee Pargiter於1504年出生在英國林可爾史爾格倫特沃斯時，她的父親Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth14歲，母親Lady Anna Louise Knight23歲。她於大約1528年與Robert Leeson III在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1564年10月7日在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福享年60歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Aimee Pargiter于1504年出生在英国林可爾史爾格倫特沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth14岁，母亲Lady Anna Louise Knight23岁。她于大约1528年与Robert Leeson III在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1564年10月7日在英国諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福享年60岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pargeter
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English pargeter ‘plasterer’, from Middle English parget ‘plaster spread on walls and ceilings, whitewash’ + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Aimee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: originally a vernacular nickname meaning ‘beloved’, from the past participle of French aimer ‘to love’ (Latin amare; compare Amy ). It has been in use in French since the Middle Ages, although it has never been very common. It is now also used, with or without the accent, as a given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Aimi
meanings: originally a vernacular nickname meaning ‘beloved’, from the past participle of French aimer ‘to love’ (Latin amare; compare Amy ). It has been in use in French since the Middle Ages, although it has never been very common. It is now also used, with or without the accent, as a given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Amy
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Aimee Pargiter was born in 1504, in Glentworth, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth, was 14 and her mother, Lady Anna Louise Knight, was 23. She married Robert Leeson III about 1528, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 7 October 1564, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Aimee Pargiter est née en 1504, à Glentworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Lady Anna Louise Knight, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Leeson III environ 1528, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 octobre 1564, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Aimee Pargiter 1504 in Glentworth, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth 14 und ihre Mutter Lady Anna Louise Knight 23. Sie hat um 1528 in England Robert Leeson III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 7. Oktober 1564 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Aimee Pargiterが1504年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレントウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworthは14歳，母Lady Anna Louise Knightは23歳であった。約1528年にイギリスでRobert Leeson IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1564年10月7日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブで60歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Aimee Pargiter(이)가 1504년 영국 링코실르 글렌트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anna Louise Knight(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1528년 영국에서 Robert Leeson III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 10월 7일 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Aimee Pargiter nasceu em 1504, em Glentworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anna Louise Knight, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Leeson III aproximadamente 1528, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1564, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Aimee Pargiter родилась в 1504 г. в местности глентворт, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anna Louise Knight, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Leeson III около 1528 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 7 октября 1564 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Murió el 7 de octubre de 1564, en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
